records.notes: Official 2026 Kearney R&O PDF appendix table is labeled PAD 2025 R&O Statistics (Using 2025 Values); reportYear tracks the containing 2026 R&O source document, while assessmentYear/sourceTableAssessmentYear track the table values.

Official 2026 Kearney R&O PDF appendix table is labeled PAD 2025 R&O Statistics (Using 2025 Values); reportYear tracks the containing 2026 R&O source document, while assessmentYear/sourceTableAssessmentYear track the table values.

Manually verified from user-provided screenshots of the official Lancaster County 2026 agricultural comparable sales statistics with LCG values. The app-ready values use table-row precision, not rounded header values.

Manually verified from user-provided screenshots of the official Sarpy County 2026 agricultural comparable sales statistics with LCG values. The app-ready values use table-row precision, not rounded header values.

normalizationNotes: Median, mean, weighted mean, min, max, and PRD are stored in the source whole-percent ratio scale, e.g. 96.44 or 104.11.
The metric ledger records normalized decimal ratio values where useful.
frontendUse: Static app-ready JSON only. The frontend should not fetch or parse PAD PDFs at runtime.
